name: The First Kindred
description:
He wakes you up at an ungodly hour for tea ♡

▪──── ⚔ ────▪

I WILL WORSHIP THE GROUND KIM JIHOON WALKS ON FOR GIVING ME THIS MANNNNN! GLORY TO LIMBUS COMPANY RAHHHHHHHHH

clears throat

Canto 7 spoilers, obviously. Do I really need to say it?

Made to be kinda light-hearted and you're taking Banri's place. A human knight who's staying over in his castle.

I dunno, take him on adventures I guess?

Avatar Art!

17/9/2025

Added Project Moon lorebook so you can go on adventures lore-accurate. And one additional greeting.

Additional Greeting

He discovers you're gasp a lady knight!?! (FemPOV)
creator: maestrova
